samples.raw: We need to output JSON valid on one line. Must include fields: "titlu","fapt","ce_inseamna","categorie". Must be Romanian, original summary, not literal translation. Must follow language rules: use co

We need to output JSON on a single line with fields: "titlu","fapt","ce_inseamna","categorie". Must be valid JSON, no extra text. Must follow constraints: Romanian correct, natural, diacritics, specif
{"titlu":"Aici este de ce Microsoft (MSFT) este una dintre cele mai bune acțiuni NASDAQ pentru investiții pe termen lung - Yahoo Finance","

We need to output JSON array on one line, each object with i, titlu, fapt (1-2 sentences with the main fact). Must translate titles and summaries into natural Romanian, correct diacritics, no words fr
We need to output JSON array on one line, each object with i, titlu, fapt (1-2 sentences with the main fact). Must translate titles and summaries into natural Romanian, correct diacritics, no foreign
